cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Ismail, sir. How are you today? Welcome to Fynd.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, ji. I'm good, thanks. A bit confused about this seller portal, though.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Don't worry, Mohammed ji. I'm here to help. Setting up your first product listing is quite straightforward, actually.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, great. I've tried looking at the guides, but it's a bit overwhelming. Can you walk me through it step by step, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, sir. First, you need to log in to your seller account on our official portal. Have you done that?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, I have. But then I got lost in all the options. What do I do after logging in?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: After logging in, you'll see a dashboard. Look for the 'Add New Product' button. It's right at the top, quite visible.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, got it. And then? Do I need to fill out a lot of forms?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, you will need to fill out some details about your product, like its name, description, and price. But don't worry, it's all straightforward.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, I think I can manage that. What about payment details? How do those work?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Payment details are handled securely through our platform. You'll be guided through setting those up as well. We use secure payment gateways like those provided by Union Bank of India.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. My bank is Union Bank of India, actually.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Excellent, sir! We have a very smooth integration with them. Now, let's get back to your product listing. Do you have any questions about the process so far?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Actually, yes. How long does it take for the product to go live after I've listed it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's usually quite quick, Mohammed ji. Once you've submitted your listing, our team reviews it to ensure everything is in order, and then it goes live. This typically happens within 24 hours.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: That's great, thank you for explaining everything so clearly. I feel much more confident now.
